extensionDescription.message: Enhances Google AI Studio with one-click Markdown copy and a conversation catalog for easy navigation.

tooltipCopyMarkdown.description: The tooltip text for the copy button.

promptTitleDefault.description: The default title for a conversation if it's not named.

errorNoDataSource.message: Failed to get conversation data source!
errorNoDataSource.description: Error message when the script cannot find the conversation data.

successCopied.description: Success message after the conversation is copied to the clipboard.

tooltipCatalog.description: The tooltip text for the catalog toggle button.

catalogHeader.description: The header text for the catalog panel.

catalogEmptyState.description: Message displayed when the catalog is empty or no user prompts are available.

tooltipScrollToBottom.description: The tooltip text for the scroll to bottom button.

popupTitle.description: The title of the extension popup.

settingIncludeThoughts.message: Include AI thought process in Markdown export
settingIncludeThoughts.description: The label for the toggle switch in the popup.

originalConversation.description: The label for the original conversation link appended to the markdown.

accountInfo.description: Label for the account information in the exported markdown.

settingIncludeLink.description: Label for the toggle switch to include original link.

settingIncludeAccount.description: Label for the toggle switch to include account email.

settingEnableNotifications.message: Enable Desktop Notifications when generation is complete (background only)
settingEnableNotifications.description: Label for the toggle switch to enable desktop notifications.

notificationMessage.message: Google AI Studio has finished generating a response.
notificationMessage.description: Message body of the desktop notification.
